empty.title: No autopilots yet
empty.hint: Schedule recurring tasks for your AI agents. Pick a template or start from scratch.

daily_news.title: Daily news digest
daily_news.summary: Search and summarize today's news for the team

pr_review.title: PR review reminder
pr_review.summary: Flag stale pull requests that need review

bug_triage.title: Bug triage
bug_triage.summary: Assess and prioritize new bug reports

weekly_progress.title: Weekly progress report
weekly_progress.summary: Compile a weekly summary of team progress

dependency_audit.title: Dependency audit
dependency_audit.summary: Scan for security vulnerabilities and outdated packages

documentation_check.title: Documentation check
documentation_check.summary: Review recent changes for documentation gaps

detail.run_blocked_invocation_not_allowed: Not triggered — you don't have permission to use this autopilot's agent
detail.run_blocked_runtime_offline: Not triggered — the agent's runtime is offline
detail.run_blocked_target_unavailable: Not triggered — the agent is unavailable
detail.run_blocked_attribution: Not triggered — the run couldn't be attributed to a responsible member
detail.run_blocked_already_active: Not triggered — a recent run already covers this
detail.run_blocked_generic: Not triggered — the run was blocked
detail.no_triggers: No triggers configured. Add a schedule to run automatically.
detail.no_runs: No runs yet. Click "Run now" to trigger manually.

delete_dialog.title: Delete autopilot
delete_dialog.description: This will permanently delete "{{title}}", along with its triggers and run history. This action cannot be undone.

access.title: Manage access
access.description: Members you add can edit, run, and manage this autopilot's triggers and webhooks.
access.empty: No one has been granted access yet.
access.owner_note: The creator and workspace admins always have access.

webhook_payload.label: Webhook event:
webhook_payload.truncated_marker: [truncated — click Copy to get the full payload]

trigger_row.rotate_confirm_description: The current URL will stop working immediately. Any external systems calling it must be updated with the new URL. Continue?

delete_dialog.title: Delete trigger
delete_dialog.description: This trigger will be removed and the autopilot will stop firing on this schedule. This action cannot be undone.

deliveries.empty: No webhook deliveries yet. Send a POST to the webhook URL to see entries here.

replay.disabled_queued: Still queued — replay once it settles

add_trigger_dialog.title: Add Trigger
add_trigger_dialog.webhook_help: Multica will generate a webhook URL after you save. POST any JSON to it to fire this autopilot.

dialog.subtitle: A recurring AI task
dialog.runbook_hint: Read by the agent on every run
dialog.description_placeholder:
# Goal
What should the agent accomplish?

# Context
Who is this for? Any constraints?

# Steps
1. …
2. …
dialog.auto_run_hint: Once saved, runs automatically until paused.
dialog.toast_create_partial: Autopilot created, but schedule failed to save
dialog.toast_create_partial_with_reason: Autopilot created, but schedule failed to save: {{reason}}
dialog.toast_update_partial: Autopilot updated, but schedule failed to save
dialog.toast_update_partial_with_reason: Autopilot updated, but schedule failed to save: {{reason}}
dialog.subscribers_hint: Auto-subscribed to every issue this autopilot creates
dialog.subscribers_empty: No subscribers — add a teammate to notify them on every run
dialog.webhook_help_create: Multica will generate a webhook URL after this autopilot is created. POST any JSON to that URL to fire it.
dialog.webhook_help_edit: This autopilot is fired by webhook. Manage the URL (copy / rotate) on the autopilot's detail page.
dialog.webhook_created_description: POST any JSON to the URL below and the autopilot will fire. Copy it now — you can also find and rotate it on the autopilot's detail page.
dialog.webhook_created_warning: Treat this URL like a password. Anyone who has it can trigger the autopilot.
dialog.event_filter_hint: Only process webhooks matching these events. Leave empty to accept all.
dialog.schedule_disabled_reason: This autopilot has multiple schedules — edit them in the detail page.

create_issue.label: Create issue
create_issue.description: Each run creates a tracked issue

schedule_editor.cron_hint: Standard 5-field cron (min hour dom month dow)
schedule_editor.timezone_invalid: This timezone isn't recognized by the server.
schedule_editor.advanced_hint: This expression uses features the visual editor can't represent. Edit the cron text directly, or simplify it to re-enable the controls.
schedule_editor.advanced_unverified: The server couldn't be reached to check this expression, so the controls stay off. Make sure the cron text is right before saving.
schedule_editor.advanced_checking: Checking this expression with the server. The controls stay off until it answers.
schedule_editor.no_upcoming_runs: This expression has no upcoming runs.

delete_dialog.title: Delete automation?
delete_dialog.description_one: This will permanently delete "{{name}}" and its run history.
delete_dialog.description_other: This will permanently delete {{count}} automations and their run history.
